source_name: DISR Resources and Energy Quarterly - critical minerals production

fields.scope: Australia is the world's largest lithium producer (spodumene), a top-5 rare earths producer, and a major nickel/copper producer. The Critical Minerals List is maintained by DISR and updated periodically.
fields.primary_source_document: DISR Resources and Energy Quarterly — Critical minerals chapter; Geoscience Australia Australian Mineral Statistics; Australia's Identified Mineral Resources.
fields.keying_plan: Key annual production tonnes per critical mineral. Lithium is reported as kt LCE (lithium carbonate equivalent) or kt spodumene concentrate; pick a basis and label clearly.

notes: Awaiting hand-keyed annual production for the strategic critical minerals list. Australia's National Reconstruction Fund and Critical Minerals Strategy elevate these as a strategic supply parallel to oil and gas. Cite the unit basis (LCE vs spodumene, REO vs total rare earths) explicitly.
citation: DISR Resources and Energy Quarterly; Geoscience Australia.
